---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the simulation platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
-------------

# Summary

Provide a short description of the requested feature.

---

# Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

Describe the current limitation, pain point, or missing capability.

Example:

* Unable to simulate OLED displays.
* No support for PWM frequency configuration.
* Limited debugging visibility for I2C communications.

---

# Proposed Solution

Describe the desired solution.

Include:

* Expected functionality
* User workflow
* Technical behavior

---

# Use Case

Who benefits from this feature?

* [ ] Students
* [ ] Educators
* [ ] Content Creators
* [ ] Platform Developers
* [ ] QA / Validation Team

Describe a typical use case:

---

# Impacted Areas

## Boards

* [ ] Raspberry Pi Pico
* [ ] ESP32
* [ ] Arduino UNO
* [ ] Arduino Nano
* [ ] Arduino Mega
* [ ] All Boards

## Components

Examples:

* LCD
* OLED
* Servo
* Ultrasonic Sensor
* Motor Driver
* Communication Modules

Affected Components:

---

# Educational Impact

How does this feature improve learning outcomes?

Examples:

* Enables additional STEM experiments
* Improves hardware understanding
* Supports advanced electronics concepts

---

# Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

---

# Acceptance Criteria

The feature will be considered complete when:

* [ ] Functional requirements implemented
* [ ] Simulator behavior validated
* [ ] Documentation updated
* [ ] Test cases added
* [ ] Regression tests passed

Additional acceptance criteria:

---

# Priority

* [ ] Critical
* [ ] High
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] Low

---

# Additional Context

Attach screenshots, mockups, diagrams, research links, or references.

---

# Estimated Benefits

Examples:

* Improves simulator accuracy
* Expands board support
* Reduces support requests
* Enables new educational content

Describe expected benefits:

```
```
